creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Just 1 hour from Disney sits the totally underrated town of 📍Lakeland, Florida, also known as Swan City! 🦢 

📍Lakeland has an amazing food scene, a quaint and walkable downtown, cute local shopping, beautiful gardens , history and awesome murals to see! 

📍Lakeland has SO much to offer! Have you ever been?

#lakelandflorida #floridahiddengems #centralfloridatowns #swancity #uniqueflorida
